Interface IDETerrain

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Element.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("0911F2FB-4B12-4012-AE6B-94FAD2D2084D")]
public interface IDETerrain

Properties

ConfigurationKeyword

The storage parameter used with SDE databases.

string ConfigurationKeyword { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxOverviewTerrainPoints

The maximum number of points in the most generalized representation of the Terrain.

int MaxOverviewTerrainPoints { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxPointsPerShape

The maximum number of vertices per multipoint stored in the terrain pyramid.

int MaxPointsPerShape { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The name of the terrain.

string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

PyramidType

The kind of the pyramid as defined by the type of filter it uses to thin points.

esriTerrainPyramidType PyramidType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriTerrainPyramidType

Examples

Sample Snippet

TileSize

The horizontal distance used to spatially index and partition terrain data.

double TileSize { get; set; }

Property Value

double
